# Agent-First Transcription API

> Async REST API for speaker-diarized video/audio transcription (Whisper + Chirp 3 + Gemini).

## Base URL
Replace with your deployment URL, e.g. https://your-app.up.railway.app

## Authentication
Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer tx_<your-api-key>`
Create a key: `POST /api/v1/keys/bootstrap` with header `X-Admin-Secret: <ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET>`

## Quick start (agent workflow)
1. `GET /health` — verify service is alive
2. `POST /api/v1/transcriptions/url` with `{"url":"https://..."}` OR `POST /api/v1/transcriptions` multipart file
3. Receive `job_id` and `status_url` (HTTP 202)
4. Poll `GET /api/v1/transcriptions/{job_id}` every 2-5s until `status` is `completed` or `failed`
5. `GET /api/v1/transcriptions/{job_id}/result` for full `TranscriptionResult` JSON
6. `GET /api/v1/usage` for quota and billing

## OpenAPI
/openapi.json — full typed schema with examples

## MCP
Run: `python -m mcp_server` — exposes tools: submit_transcription_url, get_transcription_status, get_transcription_result, get_usage

## Error format
All errors: `{"error":{"code":"...","message":"...","retryable":bool,"suggested_action":"...","docs_url":"..."}}`
Catalog: /docs/errors

## Limits
- Max upload: 100MB
- Default rate: 30 RPM per key, 120 RPM global
- Default quota: 500 jobs/month per key

## Pricing
~$0.05 per job billed (see PRICING.md). Pipeline cost $0.02-0.08 upstream.

## Discovery
- /.well-known/agent.json
- /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- /llms.txt (this file)
